Document:
# Goblin
Goblins can eat raw meat with no ill effects, but sugar and food made with sugar tastes disgusting to them and makes them vomit.
They take [color=#1e90ff]20% less Poison damage and 20% less Burn damage[/color], but they take [color=#ffa500]25% more Brute damage.[/color]
Goblins deal reduced Slash damage with their unarmed attack.
